title: Senior ABAP Developer
published: Published on 11 June 2026 · Position available immediately
desc.1: As a Senior ABAP Developer in Avignon, you develop SAP solutions and support our clients in their SAP implementation and evolution projects.
mission.1: Développer des programmes et rapports ABAP
mission.2: Concevoir des interfaces SAP (RFC, IDoc, BAPI)
mission.3: Optimiser les performances des développements SAP
mission.4: Réaliser les études d'impact et les spécifications techniques
mission.5: Assurer le support applicatif SAP N2/N3
mission.6: Participer aux projets de migration S/4HANA
profile.3: Maîtrise d'ABAP OO, BAPI, IDoc, Smartforms, ABAP Workbench
profile.4: Knowledge of SAP Basis is a plus
profile.5: Certification SAP ABAP is a plus
